login.title: Welcome to NoteFlow
login.desc: Sign in to sync your tasks, ideas and projects to the cloud.
login.privacy: Your data lives in your own Firestore account — no one else can read it.
login.notConfiguredDesc: Create a .env file at the project root with the following variables, then restart the dev server:

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Manage everything that needs doing — drag from "To do" to "Done"

empty.title: No tasks yet
empty.desc: Start by adding your first task.

ideas.title: Ideas
ideas.subtitle: Capture every idea — you don't need to know when you'll act on it

empty.title: No ideas yet
empty.desc: When something interesting hits you, write it down before you forget.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Group related tasks into projects to track progress

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.desc: Create a project to group related tasks.

projects.confirmDelete: Delete project "{name}"? Its tasks will be kept.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your data — everything is stored in your browser

language.title: Language
language.desc: Choose the display language for the app.

theme.title: Theme
theme.desc: Choose a color palette for the app.

overview.title: Data overview
overview.summary: You have {tasks} tasks, {ideas} ideas and {projects} projects.

backup.title: Backup & restore
backup.desc: Export to a JSON file to back up or transfer to another machine. Importing will overwrite your current data.

seed.title: Sample data
seed.desc: Reload sample data to see how the app works. This will overwrite current data.
seed.confirm: Overwrite current data with sample data?

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.desc: Delete all data in this browser. Cannot be undone — export JSON first if you need to.
danger.confirm: Delete ALL data? This action cannot be undone.
